arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in Fiorentina’s Moise Kean
arts.sum: Moise Kean will be one of the hottest properties in Serie A when the transfer window opens in the summer. After all the Fiorentina striker has already scored 16 goals…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid stars will go head-to-head for top scorer prize in Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: The upcoming Copa del Rey final will see members of the attacking ranks at Barcelona and Real Madrid lock horns for the competition’s top scorer award. The pair in question?…

arts.ttl: One Barcelona star has played 99 straight games for club and country
arts.sum: A staggering statistic surrounding the ongoing availability of a member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has come to the fore online. The player in question? Jules…

arts.ttl: Girona star the victim of sudden robbery on streets of Barcelona
arts.sum: Girona star Arthur Melo was the victim of an altogether unpleasant experience whilst out and about in Barcelona on Friday. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Barcelona credited with ‘strong’ interest in Fiorentina star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Friday been credited with a somewhat surprising interest in a member of the attacking ranks at Fiorentina. The player in question? Moise Kean. Frontman…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Olmo clearance doesn't mar LaLiga
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti does not believe the decision to allow Barcelona's Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor to continue playing for the club will taint any competition, with his team potentially facing Barça for three trophies.

arts.ttl: Kean: Barcelona join Newcastle in transfer race, but Fiorentina send clear message
arts.sum: Fiorentina President Rocco Commisso insists he wants Moise Kean to stay, while Italian media claim...

VLOG | Atlético Madrid v Barça Copa del Rey semifinal second leg - FC Barcelona Copa del Rey final Clásico confirmed – the first since 2014 – as FC Barcelona win for the second time in two weeks at the Metropolitano stadium and they now have the chance to extend their record of 31-time winners of the trophy.

arts.ttl: ‘Absolutely no problem’ - Szczęsny talks Ter Stegen’s return
arts.sum: It’s not clear yet when he will be ready - but Szczesny shared his thoughts about the situation after the win over Atletico Madrid . “I want to help the team and do my best on the pitch, but if the coach decides that the team captain is coming back and defending, then for me it’s an understandable situation.”
Barcelona president Joan Laporta revealed that manager Hansi Flick has expressed concerns about the club's financial uncertainty going forward.
